pillar_metadata.name: Depth
pillar_metadata.description: The stored pressure or unrealized possibility held within the system’s constraints; represents the agent’s resilience and ceiling for complex work.

capacity_buffer.impact: High Depth absorbs entropy and protects Integrity from overload.

ambition_scaling.impact: Depth defines the scale of longer-term, multi-step planning.

ossification.result: High potential becomes ossified because there is insufficient throughput to express it.

vulnerability.result: The agent can no longer absorb disruption and becomes brittle.
